title: copisma secundum
intro: Copisma secundum, also known as the Copium tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a small tree or shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, making it beneficial for treating coughs, colds, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Copisma secundum include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
